flat_sketch.description: 기술 도식화 — 봉제선·디테일·비율 중심, 무채색 선화. brand_booster OFF이 핵심.
flat_sketch.prompt_base: Technical flat lay fashion sketch, 2D elevation view, clean black outline on pure white background, precise proportions, no model, no color fill, brand tech pack format, garment CAD style, front view or back view
flat_sketch.negative_base: color fill, vivid colors, painting, illustration, 3D, shading, photorealistic, model, person, background texture, pop art, graffiti, doodle, watercolor, sketch marks, coloring, gradient

lookbook.description: 모델 착장 에디토리얼 — 한국인 모델, 거리 현장감, 브랜드 컬러 반영
lookbook.prompt_base: Editorial fashion photography, full-body shot, natural Korean trendsetter pose, sharp focus on garment, high dynamic range
lookbook.negative_base: amateur, snapshot, overexposed, muddy colors, extra limbs, deformed hands, bad anatomy, poorly drawn face, bad proportions

graphic.description: 프린트·자수용 그래픽 원고 — 벡터 스타일, 플랫 컬러, 중앙 구도
graphic.prompt_base: Vector-style print-ready illustration, bold outline, flat color fill, doodle graffiti aesthetic, centered composition, white background, no background gradient, sticker style
graphic.negative_base: photorealistic, gradient shading, 3D, texture, noise, complicated background, model, person, garment, photograph

moodboard.description: 스타일 레퍼런스 기반 무드 생성 — 레퍼런스 이미지 필수
moodboard.prompt_base: Mood reference composite, editorial fashion mood, inspired by reference style

colorway.description: 동일 아이템 컬러 배리에이션 — 실루엣 고정, 컬러만 교체
colorway.prompt_base: Same garment silhouette as reference, only color variation, consistent proportions
colorway.negative_base: different silhouette, different cut, different proportions, different style, different graphic

structure_control.description: 레퍼런스 이미지의 구조(엣지·깊이·외곽선)를 락하고 프롬프트로 재해석. v2.1 Phase 2 ControlNet — Canny(실루엣 락) / Depth(드레이프) / SoftEdge(재질 교체).
structure_control.prompt_base: Fashion garment reconstruction with structural control, preserve silhouette and proportions from reference, high fidelity detail
structure_control.negative_base: deformed structure, broken silhouette, warped proportions, missing reference details, amateur, low quality
